sql-history-purpose.label: History and Purpose of SQL
sql-history-purpose.summary: Learn the origins and main uses of SQL in data management.

sketch-history-sql.title: The Origins of SQL
sketch-history-sql.bodyMarkdown: SQL, or Structured Query Language, was first developed in the early 1970s at IBM by Donald D. Chamberlin and Raymond F. Boyce. It was designed to manage and query data stored in relational databases, which organize data into tables with rows and columns. The language was initially called SEQUEL, but later shortened to SQL due to trademark issues.

sketch-purpose-sql.title: The Purpose of SQL
sketch-purpose-sql.bodyMarkdown: The main purpose of SQL is to interact with relational databases. SQL allows users to create, read, update, and delete data (often called CRUD operations). It is used for defining database structures, querying data, and managing access to data. Today, SQL is the standard language for relational database management systems and is used by organizations worldwide to handle large amounts of structured information.

quiz-sql-origin.title: Who developed SQL?
quiz-sql-origin.prompt: Who were the original developers of SQL?
quiz-sql-origin.hint: Think about IBM researchers in the 1970s.

help.concept: SQL was created by researchers at IBM to work with relational databases.
help.hint_1: The developers were not associated with Microsoft or Google.
help.hint_2: Their names are Donald D. Chamberlin and Raymond F. Boyce.

options.a: Donald D. Chamberlin and Raymond F. Boyce

quiz-sql-purpose.title: Main Purposes of SQL
quiz-sql-purpose.prompt: Which of the following are main purposes of SQL? Select all that apply.
quiz-sql-purpose.hint: Focus on tasks related to data in databases.

help.concept: SQL is used for managing and manipulating data in relational databases.
help.hint_1: SQL is not used for web design.
help.hint_2: Look for options that involve interacting with data in tables.

quiz-sql-chronology.title: SQL Timeline
quiz-sql-chronology.prompt: Arrange these events in the correct chronological order.
quiz-sql-chronology.hint: Start with the earliest event at IBM.

help.concept: Understanding the sequence of SQL's development helps clarify its evolution.
help.hint_1: SEQUEL was the original name before SQL.
help.hint_2: The standardization came after the renaming.

tokens.t3: SQL becomes a standard language for relational databases

quiz-sql-fill-purpose.title: SQL's Primary Role
quiz-sql-fill-purpose.prompt: SQL is primarily used to manage and ______ data in relational databases.
quiz-sql-fill-purpose.hint: Think about retrieving information from databases.

help.concept: SQL's main function is to retrieve and manipulate data.
help.hint_1: It's not about graphics or animation.
help.hint_2: The word starts with 'q' and means to ask for information.

quiz-sql-fill-purpose.template: SQL is primarily used to manage and [_____] data in relational databases.

quiz-sql-code-intro.title: Basic SQL Query Example
quiz-sql-code-intro.prompt: Write a SQL query to select all columns from the 'students' table in the 'students_intro' dataset.
quiz-sql-code-intro.hint: Use the SELECT statement to get all columns.

help.concept: The SELECT statement is used to retrieve data from a table in SQL.
help.hint_1: Use * to select all columns from the table.
help.hint_2: Remember to specify the table name after FROM.
